text: Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 42 9.3 PIPING, VALVES, THERMAL INSULATION AND MISCELLANEOUS SYSTEMS/ EQUIPMENTS 9.3.1 Power Cycle Piping System S. No. Description Quantity i) Spare gaskets for all the gate valve 100% of each type, size for sizes 15 mm NB to 500 mm NB and class ii) Spare sets of gland packings of all the gate valves for all sizes - do- iii) Spare gaskets for all the globe valves for - do- sizes 15 mm NB to 500 mm NB iv) Spare sets of gland packings for all the globe valves for all sizes - do- v) Spare gaskets for all NRVs - do- vi) Spare set of gaskets for safety - do- relief valves, for all sizes vii) Complete gate valves assembly upto the size of 50 NB 100% of each type, size and classt viii) Complete angle valves only upto the size of 50 NB - do- ix) Complete globe valves up to the size of 50 NB - do- x) Complete NRV’s assembly upto the size of 50 NB - do- xi) Complete needle valves upto the size of 50 NB - do- xii) Spring hangers (variable spring and 10% of total population constant spring hangers) of one (1) unit for each type and stiffness with minimum one (1) no. xiii) Gasket for each flanged connection on high pressure steam and feed line 2 nos. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 43 xiv) Steam traps and Y type strainers All internals required to comple te one 10% of total population full assembly, except body of one (1) unit for each size, type and rating, or minimum one (1) set xv) Other valves a) Each type, size and class for 100 mm 1 no. and below but above 50 NB b) Each type, size and class above 100 mm 20% or 2 nos. whichever is higher 9.3.2 Thermal Insulation, Refractory, Lagging and Cladding 5% of the total quantity/ population used for each type, size and class with minimum 2 nos. 9.3.3 Low Pressure Piping System Valves 5% of the total population of each type, size and class or minimum 2 nos. of each type, size and class whichever is higher 9.3.4 Equipment Cooling Water (ECW) System i) DMCCW pumps for TG auxiliaries (as required for one pump)
